items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to confirm the implementation of the guest privileges requirement.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for guest privileges, allowing a member to bring a friend once a month. However, while the linked use case mentions this feature, there is no concrete evidence in the prior steps that demonstrates this functionality has been implemented or tested successfully. Therefore, the evidence does not support the fulfillment of this requirement, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
